name: MFA FINANCIAL, INC.
business: MFA Financial, Inc. is a specialty finance company that invests in and finances residential mortgage assets. The company invests, on a leveraged basis, in residential whole loans, residential mortgage securities and other real estate assets. Through its wholly-owned subsidiary Lima One, it originates and services business purpose loans for real estate investors.

exposures.sentence: We are a specialty finance company that invests in and finances residential mortgage assets.
Maintaining cybersecurity and data security is important to our business and a breach of our cybersecurity or data security could result in serious harm to our reputation.
We may utilize artificial intelligence, which exposes us to liability and affects our business.

catalysts.event: relaunch multifamily lending and begin funding through wholesale channel
catalysts.sentence: In early 2026, we relaunched multifamily lending and began funding loans through our newly established wholesale channel, which represent two key areas of growth for Lima One.
